name: Prudence
descriptionTemplate: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by X%.

progression.renderedDesc: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 5%.
progression.renderedDescFr: Self-moral will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of allié troops around it will have their counterattack dégâts augmenté de 5%.

progression.renderedDesc: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 10%.
progression.renderedDescFr: Self-moral will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of allié troops around it will have their counterattack dégâts augmenté de 10%.

progression.renderedDesc: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 15%.
progression.renderedDescFr: Self-moral will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of allié troops around it will have their counterattack dégâts augmenté de 15%.

progression.renderedDesc: Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 25%.

descriptionTemplateFr: Self-moral will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of allié troops around it will have their counterattack dégâts augmenté by X%.
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Prudence » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Self-moral will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of allié troops around it will have their counterattack dégâts augmenté de 25%. ». Signature de carte — impossible à remplacer, définit souvent l'identité tactique du général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Prudence" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 25%.". A card signature — cannot be swapped; it often defines the general's tactical identity.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Prudence“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „Self-morale will not be disrupted. Self and 1 square of friendly troops around it will have their counterattack damage increased by 25%.“. Eine Karten-Signatur — nicht austauschbar, prägt oft die taktische Identität des Generals.
